description: Common FISH intrinsic families for scripted FLAC model inspection, validation, and data extraction.

items.name: zone-gridpoint
items.description: Zone and gridpoint pointer iteration, state inspection, extra variables, groups, stress/strain, and vector components.
items.common_use: Build validation scripts that inspect model state after solves.

items.name: field-query
items.description: zone.field.* setup and query patterns for extracting interpolated values at arbitrary points.
items.common_use: Sample displacement, stress, pore pressure, or temperature at probe locations.

items.name: structure-interface
items.description: Structural element and interface FISH families for support and discontinuity post-processing.
items.common_use: Extract forces, moments, link/interface state, and reinforcement response.
